name: Birn+Partners

name: Strategic Consulting Japan G.K.
description: The company emphasizes the importance of engaging licensed consulting firms for executive search in Japan due to strict local laws on personal privacy and data protection. They highlight the risks of offshoring talent acquisition, as it could lead to legal liabilities for your Japan business.

name: HR Baraka Group

name: Page Executive

description: Insight Global is an executive recruiting agency that specializes in helping firms find the right executives to meet their needs. They offer a range of services, including executive placement and enhanced staffing solutions, making them a valuable resource for any executive search.
